## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog categories need updating before new blog design launch; dev team to be consulted for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Reddit marketing efforts showing promise with organic engagement and agency-assisted strategy](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Newsletter subscriptions increasing, primarily from personal email addresses of IT professionals](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Site traffic and key metrics recovering from summer slowdown, with US traffic expected to rebound](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Blog Updates

  - [New blog design launch pending category updates](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [FAQ and read time features to be implemented after new blog design](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [DevOps tools added to future content plans](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Competitor mentions in content carefully managed (e.g., FreshService removed from an article)](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Tools page traffic increased by 170% week-over-week, with 60 unique views last week](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Glossary now fully indexed except for 4 entries due to quota limits](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### Reddit Marketing Strategy

  - [Agency (Tactical) engaged for seeded comments and posts across communities](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Early signs of organic engagement observed](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Post views tracking available, but source unclear (250 views on first post)](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Team to investigate potential visibility in search engines and AI language models](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Newsletter and Lead Generation

  - [Newsletter subscriptions up 70-80% week-over-week from blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Product newsletter revived 2-3 opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Most signups use personal email addresses, primarily from IT professionals in traditional industries](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Considering opening free trial access to personal email addresses to expand funnel](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Site Performance and Metrics

  - [Key pages (demos, signups) showing increased traffic](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Free trial numbers improving over the past two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [PPC strategy shifting to focus on brand awareness and impressions rather than conversions](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Google Ads driving some newsletter signups (9-10 per week) but no direct trial conversions](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Influencer Marketing Exploration

  - [Difficulty finding relevant IT influencers](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Jakub offered insights from Scribe's successful influencer strategy](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Team to investigate potential IT influencers who have worked with competitors or related tools](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to explore potential IT influencers and share findings with Carmel](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Carmel to send content for review by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/E35rQDK-zBLhcXzyeJUiZFcU67XB4Vg1?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
